nl_query: For each department, show the department name, number of courses, number of faculty members, number of active boards, number of scripts currently in evaluation, and the average marks awarded per script.
failed_sql:
SELECT au.name AS academic_unit_name, COUNT(DISTINCT au.id) AS num_courses, COUNT(DISTINCT fc.employee_id) AS num_faculty_members, COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) AS num_active_boards, COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS num_scripts_in_evaluation, AVG(COUNT(em.marks_awarded)) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS avg_evaluation_marks_per_script
FROM   academic_unit au
JOIN   academic_unit_closure c      ON c.ancestor_id = au.id
JOIN   academic_unit         course ON course.id     = c.descendant_id
JOIN   faculty_cache         fc ON fc.department_id = au.id
JOIN   board                b ON b.course_id = au.id AND b.status = 'EVAL_IN_PROGRESS'
JOIN   answer_script        a ON a.course_id = au.id
LEFT JOIN evaluation_marks em ON em.attempt_id = a.id
WHERE  au.unit_type = 'COURSE'
GROUP  BY au.name
ORDER  BY avg_evaluation_marks_per_script DESC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): unaliased.avg_evaluation_marks_per_script, unaliased.avg_evaluation_marks_per_script. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
